query: SELECT v.id as video_id, v.scriptId, vs.id as script_id, vs.videoType, vs.duration, LEFT(vs.scenes, 500) as scenes_preview FROM videos v JOIN videoScripts vs ON vs.id = v.scriptId WHERE v.id = 480010;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT v.id as video_id, v.scriptId, vs.id as script_id, vs.videoType, vs.duration, LEFT(vs.scenes, 500) as scenes_preview FROM videos v JOIN videoScripts vs ON vs.id = v.scriptId WHERE v.id = 480010;
